name: Gree Electric Appliances, Inc. of Zhuhai
summary: Gree Electric Appliances, Inc. of Zhuhai produces and sells household appliances worldwide. The company offers residential air conditioners (ACs), including wall-mounted, floor-standing, window, portable, dehumidifier, and special ACs; commercial ACs, such as light commercial, multi-VRF, chiller, terminal, packaged unit, and special ACs; and air to water heat pumps comprising residential and commercial water heaters, and multi-functional heat pumps. It also provides home appliances that include electric fans and heaters, water dispensers and purifiers, humidifiers, multi-cookers, air purifiers, electric kettles, pressure and induction cookers; side by side, Italian type, multi-door, three door, combi, double door, single door, and chest freezer refrigerators; and smartphone, industrial, compressor, motor, enameled wires, intelligent equipment, machine tools, and precision molding products and castings equipment. The company serves the public, financial and communication, office, real estate, shopping center, hotel, and industrial sectors. The company was formerly known as Haili Air-conditioning Engineering Co., Ltd. of Zhuhai and changed its name to Gree Electric Appliances, Inc. of Zhuhai in 1994. Gree Electric Appliances, Inc. of Zhuhai was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Zhuhai, China.
